ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., wearable, smartphone) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time when the device was last synchronized with the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device ID */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity type ID */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity (latitude and longitude) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., walking, running, swimming) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the activity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity ID */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity type ID */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device ID */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_entries_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_entries_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_entries_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_data ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of the goal (e.g., step count, distance) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the goal was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal ID */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress entry */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Value of the progress entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the progress entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the progress entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of the recommendation (e.g., workout, nutrition) */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., goal achieved, progress update) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., unit system, language) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
